name: Open Faced Pita Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Saute or steam vegetables until tender. Drain any excess liquid.
3. Season the vegetables to taste with salt, pepper, and Mrs. Dash.
4. Spread a thin layer of mustard on one side of each whole pita pocket.
5. Arrange vegetables and tomato slices over the mustard on top of each pita.
6. Toast the pita sandwiches lightly in the oven until golden brown.
7. Serves 2. Serving size: 1 whole pita.
